title: Hybrid Cloud Migration & Secure Landing Zone Deployment
homeDescription: Led the greenfield deployment of a secure, hybrid Azure environment for a financial enterprise migrating from on-premises datacenters. Designed and implemented a scalable landing zone with public and private VNets, high-availability Cisco NVAs, and seamless integration with legacy systems.
listingDescription: Led the greenfield deployment of a secure, hybrid Azure environment for a financial enterprise migrating from on-premises datacenters. Designed and implemented a scalable landing zone with public and private VNets, high-availability Cisco NVAs, and seamless integration with legacy systems.

title: Custom Resource Provisioning Portal
homeDescription: Led the development of a secure, client-compliant portal for resource provisioning in Azure. Integrated approval workflows, granular access control, and automated deployment using REST APIs, .NET, SPNs, IAM, PowerShell, and JSON. Achieved zero unauthorized access, 100% compliance.
listingDescription: Led the development of a secure, client-compliant portal for resource provisioning in Azure. Integrated approval workflows, granular access control, and automated deployment using REST APIs, .NET, SPNs, IAM, PowerShell, and JSON. Achieved zero unauthorized access, 100% compliance, 60% faster provisioning, and $320,000 annual cost savings.

title: Automated Sequential Node Restart for HD Insight Cluster
homeDescription: Developed a shell script to sequentially restart worker nodes in an HD Insight cluster, reducing job failures by 80% and manual intervention by 90%. Scheduled automation during low-load periods ensured 99.8% uptime and zero disruption to running jobs.
listingDescription: Developed a shell script to sequentially restart worker nodes in an HD Insight cluster, reducing job failures by 80% and manual intervention by 90%. Scheduled automation during low-load periods ensured 99.8% uptime and zero disruption to running jobs. Achieved $60,000 annual cost savings, improved operational efficiency, and enhanced cluster reliability.

title: Automated Vulnerability Management
homeDescription: Designed and implemented an automated solution using Microsoft Defender, Logic Apps, and Function Apps to detect, notify, and remediate vulnerabilities. Achieved 95% faster notifications, 80% faster remediation, and 100% compliance for critical issues. Automated reminders, tracking, and enforcement reduced manual effort by 85%.
listingDescription: Designed and implemented an automated solution using Microsoft Defender, Logic Apps, and Function Apps to detect, notify, and remediate vulnerabilities. Achieved 95% faster notifications, 80% faster remediation, and 100% compliance for critical issues. Automated reminders, tracking, and enforcement reduced manual effort by 85% and saved $70,000 annually.
